providers.name: Marketstack

capabilities.notes: Quote derived from latest EOD record; NOT real-time. Intraday bid/ask/last NULL since IEX 2025-02-01 policy change without direct IEX entitlement.

capabilities.historicalDepth: plan-gated: Free 1y, Basic 10y, Professional+ 15+y (marketing claims up to 30y)
capabilities.notes: CRSP-methodology adjusted prices available (adj_* fields); splits/dividends for US-listed venues.

capabilities.historicalDepth: US/IEX universe only; sub-15min intervals need Professional plan
capabilities.notes: US-only IEX data, not consolidated tape. Treat as indicative, never as consolidated real-time.
Splits and dividends endpoints; US-listed venue coverage strongest.
Symbology enrichment: CIK, ISIN, CUSIP, LEI, SIC, sector/industry. Documented capability; no normalized service route yet (no TickersSource interface) — direct adapter use only.
Exchange metadata incl. MIC, operating MIC, LEI.

licensing.storageRestrictions: Not explicitly prohibited in reviewed docs; upstream sources (Tiingo for US, Finnworlds) may impose display/redistribution conditions.
licensing.redistribution: Standard API license; resale/syndication not covered — treat as internal-use.
licensing.notes: US data licensed via Tiingo; intraday is IEX-only and bid/ask/last fields are NULL since 2025-02-01 without direct IEX entitlement.

entitlementNotes: Historical depth, intraday granularity (<15min), and several datasets (commodities, company ratings) are plan-gated.
v1 endpoints deprecated after 2025-06-30 — v2 only.
limitations: EOD is the core dataset; intraday is US/IEX-only and not consolidated tape.
Intraday closing prices differ from official auction-based EOD closes.
No options, futures curves, or fixed-income instrument data.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: global equity/ETF/index EOD history, corporate actions, symbology, exchange reference data.

providers.name: FRED (Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis)
providers.apiVersion: v1 (fred/*); v2 only for bulk release observations

capabilities.historicalDepth: varies per series; some from 1929 or earlier; vintages (ALFRED) back to first publication
capabilities.notes: De facto institutional reference for official macro series (GDP, CPI, employment, Treasury curves, credit spreads incl. ICE BofA OAS, FX reference rates). Point-in-time vintages via realtime_start/end — revision-safe backtesting.
fred/series/search with full-text and tag filtering.

Release calendar + fred/series/updates for change detection (minute-granularity windows). Documented capability; no normalized service route yet (MacroSeriesSource has no releases method) — direct adapter use only.

rateLimits.limit: No numeric limit published; HTTP 429 on breach — use conservative client-side throttling (~2 rps)

licensing.storageRestrictions: API Terms of Use prohibit storing/caching/archiving FRED content and incorporating it into any database without written permission — DISK CACHING DISABLED for this adapter; in-memory per-process only.
licensing.attribution: REQUIRED verbatim: 'This product uses the FRED API but is not endorsed or certified by the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis.' Also cite the original source via FRED (e.g. 'Source: BLS via FRED').
licensing.redistribution: Restricted; series from third-party sources carry upstream restrictions.
licensing.notes: Attribution string must appear in any user-facing report built on FRED data.

entitlementNotes: Free API key; no paid tiers.
limitations: No intraday/real-time market data; highest frequency is daily.
Data revised by source agencies — always distinguish latest vs point-in-time vintage.
Storage/caching prohibition constrains platform-side persistence.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: US + international macro series, rates/credit/FX reference series, vintage (point-in-time) macro data, release calendars.

providers.name: CoinGecko Pro API

capabilities.notes: Aggregated cached prices (20-30s cadence on paid plans). Symbol is interpreted as a CoinGecko coin id (e.g. 'bitcoin') — symbols alone are ambiguous.
simple/price by coin id; onchain (GeckoTerminal) endpoints for contract-address lookups. Cached aggregates, not exchange-direct.
market_chart / OHLC endpoints; daily point finalized 00:10 UTC.

coins/markets, categories, global aggregates, exchange metadata with trust_score and depth metrics, derivatives listings. Documented capability; no normalized service route yet — direct adapter use only.
GeckoTerminal onchain endpoints under /onchain/.

rateLimits.limit: per-minute limit + monthly call credits; 200 OK = 1 credit

licensing.storageRestrictions: Not explicitly prohibited for internal use in reviewed docs.
licensing.attribution: Attribution expected for public display of data (per docs/branding guidance).
licensing.notes: Internal research use is the safe envelope.

entitlementNotes: Pro base URL requires a paid plan key; Demo keys use a different host and lower freshness.
limitations: Aggregated cached data (10s-12h cadence depending on endpoint/plan) — never present as tick-level real-time.
Crypto/NFT/DEX only.
Hourly data plan-gated; 5-minutely Enterprise-only.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: crypto reference prices, market caps, sector/category analytics, venue quality screening, long crypto history.

providers.name: Birdeye Data Services
providers.authMechanism: header X-API-KEY (+ x-chain header for chain selection, default solana)

capabilities.notes: DEX-derived prices by contract address; vendor claims real-time but NO quantified latency SLA — verify empirically before latency-sensitive use.

capabilities.historicalDepth: 1s candles: 2 weeks; 15s/30s: 3 months; minute+ retention undocumented
capabilities.notes: OHLCV down to 1-second granularity; tick-level DEX trades via seek_by_time.
Pool liquidity, trades, token screening (token list v3), new listings, token security/rug-check.
Wallet portfolio/net-worth endpoints; secondary to Helius (Solana) and Moralis/Alchemy (EVM).

licensing.storageRestrictions: ToS clause 10.2.a prohibits copying/scraping/storing/reproducing data as written (platform-oriented wording, no API carve-out documented) — treat storage as RESTRICTED pending clarification; disk caching disabled.
licensing.notes: Compute-unit billing per endpoint; WebSocket available on paid plans.

entitlementNotes: Free tier 1 rps is unusable for production; Premium+ recommended for research workloads.
limitations: Crypto/DEX only; no CEX order books.
No latency SLA or uptime guarantee documented.
Historical depth undocumented for most datasets.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: multi-chain DEX market data — token prices by contract, tick trades, fine-grained OHLCV, liquidity, long-tail token screening, token security checks.

providers.name: Alchemy
providers.apiVersion: per-product: node v2, NFT v3, Data/Portfolio v1, Prices v1
providers.authMechanism: API key embedded in URL path ({network}.g.alchemy.com/v2/{key}); Data/Prices APIs under api.g.alchemy.com with key in path

capabilities.historicalDepth: full archive data on all plan tiers
capabilities.notes: JSON-RPC node access across 40+ chains; logs/receipts/traces (traces PAYG+); WebSockets + HMAC-signed webhooks. Documented capability; no normalized service route (raw RPC is adapter-direct only).

capabilities.historicalDepth: historical transfers by block range; indexing lag not quantified
capabilities.notes: alchemy_getAssetTransfers; toBlock 'indexed' tag signals indexing pipeline lag.
Portfolio API multi-chain token + NFT balances; Token API balances/metadata.
Prices API v1: update frequency and lookback NOT documented — inspect per-price lastUpdatedAt at runtime; never present as exchange-grade real-time.

licensing.storageRestrictions: Internal business purposes only per ToS v2.0 (2025-06-27); no explicit caching clause.
licensing.notes: Compute-unit metering; costs vary per method (eth_getLogs 75 CU etc.).

entitlementNotes: Trace/debug APIs require PAYG+; throughput configured at account level.
limitations: Crypto/on-chain only.
Prices API freshness/depth undocumented.
No formal API versioning/deprecation policy document.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: EVM multi-chain node RPC, historical transfer reconstruction, real-time event monitoring (webhooks).
FALLBACK: multi-chain wallet balances, token prices.

providers.name: Helius
providers.apiVersion: JSON-RPC 2.0 (RPC/DAS); REST v0 (enhanced tx, webhooks); REST v1 (wallet)

capabilities.notes: Solana RPC with commitment levels; DAS API indexed near-real-time (last_indexed_slot in responses); LaserStream gRPC + webhooks for events. Documented capability; no normalized service route (raw RPC is adapter-direct only).
DAS getAssetsByOwner/getTokenAccounts; embedded USD prices are hourly ESTIMATES for top-10k tokens only — never treat embedded prices as market data.

capabilities.historicalDepth: mainnet: unlimited full history (getTransactionsForAddress); devnet 2 weeks
capabilities.notes: Full-history Solana transaction research; Enhanced Transactions API flagged legacy — prefer getTransactionsForAddress.

licensing.redistribution: ToS 7(v) prohibits sublicense/resell/distribute of Helius products.

entitlementNotes: Wallet API and LaserStream have plan-specific limits.
limitations: Solana-only.
Embedded token prices are hourly estimates (top 10k tokens), explicitly not real-time market rates.
Token-account discovery before slot 111,491,819 needs documented workarounds.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: Solana holdings, full-history transaction/transfer research, entity tagging (32,500+ tagged accounts), real-time Solana event monitoring.

providers.name: Moralis
providers.apiVersion: EVM v2.2; DeFi v1; Solana unversioned (solana-gateway)

capabilities.notes: Documented freshness: blocks p50<4s; derived metrics (holders, PnL) may lag under load. Multi-chain balances, net worth, DeFi positions (5,000+ protocols, plan-gated).

capabilities.historicalDepth: full decoded wallet history (per-chain genesis depth not stated)
capabilities.notes: Decoded transaction history; token metadata with holder concentration, spam/security scores.
DEX-derived prices (not consolidated CEX tape); thin-liquidity pairs can mislead — use min_pair_side_liquidity_usd / securityScore mitigations.
Swap tape, pair OHLCV, liquidity. Solana removed 2026-07-17: adapter's getDexPairs does not support solana (registry/adapter mismatch found in review).

rateLimits.limit: 40+ rps; CU quotas by tier, overage billed

licensing.storageRestrictions: Not explicitly addressed in General T&C.
licensing.redistribution: No transfer/sub-licence of Services to third parties; data redistribution not explicitly addressed — treat as internal-use.
licensing.notes: Compute-unit billing per endpoint (e.g. token price 50 CU, DeFi positions 5000 CU).

entitlementNotes: DeFi positions, token search/trending are plan-gated (Starter/Pro+).
limitations: Crypto/on-chain only.
Prices/OHLCV are DEX-derived, not consolidated tape.
Derived metrics can lag during high activity.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: EVM wallet intelligence (history, PnL, net worth), token due-diligence (holders, spam/security scores), DeFi position monitoring.
FALLBACK: EVM/Solana token prices and DEX data.

providers.name: Nansen
providers.apiVersion: v1 (/api/v1/); v1beta1 backtesting (beta, breaking changes possible)

capabilities.historicalDepth: smart-money historical holdings: 4-year rolling window; token screener retention: ~130min (minute) / ~50h (hourly) / ~50d (daily)
capabilities.notes: Differentiated proprietary dataset: smart-money netflows/holdings/DEX trades of labeled entities. Labels are MODEL ESTIMATES. Strict redistribution limits — internal research use only. premium_labels default flips to false 2026-04-01.
Profiler balances/PnL/counterparties across 30+ chains; per-endpoint chain support varies significantly (Bitcoin Profiler-only; Solana lacks tx lookup).

rateLimits.limit: 75 rps / 1,500 rpm; per-endpoint overrides (e.g. profiler perp-trades 5 rpm)

licensing.storageRestrictions: Governed by Data Redistribution Guidelines (2025-11-18) + ToS.
licensing.attribution: Some endpoints redistributable with/without attribution per Guidelines; smart-money data is restricted.
licensing.redistribution: Endpoint-specific allowlist; DEFAULT TO INTERNAL-ONLY for anything not explicitly allowed.
licensing.notes: Check the per-endpoint redistribution table before any external publication.

entitlementNotes: Pro plan needed for meaningful throughput; beta endpoints subject to breaking changes.
limitations: Crypto-only.
Chain support varies per endpoint (smart-money historical on only 4 chains).
Labels are proprietary model output — treat as model_estimate, not observed fact.
Short retention on screener granularities.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: smart-money flow intelligence, wallet/entity due diligence and forensics, token holder-base analytics.

providers.name: NewsData.io

capabilities.notes: 200+ countries, ~89 languages, source-tier filtering. Real-time claimed on paid plans; free tier delayed 12h — freshness recorded as delayed until plan verified. Measure actual latency via fetched_at.
q/qInTitle queries; crypto endpoint has per-coin tagging + vendor sentiment (Professional+); market endpoint is ticker-tagged news.
Historical corpus for NLP/backtest research.

licensing.redistribution: PERMISSIVE (unusual): terms explicitly allow customers to sublicense/sell/syndicate/share the Data on their own responsibility.
licensing.notes: Data Derivatives usable for internal AND external business purposes.

entitlementNotes: Sentiment filter Professional+; archive depth plan-gated; free tier delayed 12h.
limitations: News-only: no prices or reference data.
Terms do not guarantee real-time delivery even on paid plans.
Vendor sentiment is a model estimate.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: multi-geography news monitoring, ticker-tagged news flow, crypto news with sentiment, historical news corpus.

providers.name: Tavily

capabilities.notes: Live web search with time_range/start_date/end_date filters; topic=news for recent news. Result 'content' is snippet text — vet sources before institutional use. 'answer' field is LLM-generated.

Page extraction to markdown at request time; crawl/map for site traversal (IR sites, regulator sites). Documented capability; no normalized service route yet (no ExtractSource interface) — direct adapter use only.
FALLBACK news discovery via topic=news when NewsData is unavailable; not a licensed news feed.

rateLimits.limit: 1,000 RPM standard; crawl 100 RPM; research creation 20 RPM

entitlementNotes: Production keys require active paid plan or PAYGO.
limitations: Not a market-data provider — unsuitable as any pricing source.
Web-derived content quality varies; requires source vetting.
No documented index-depth guarantee.
preferredUses: PRIMARY: qualitative web research, document extraction for research pipelines, event/controversy scanning.
